data.summary: Exploratory validation could not be completed due to a failure in the evaluation process.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate explicit UC need #9' could not be conclusively scored because the LLM evaluation call failed, resulting in an inconclusive verdict. There is no available evidence to confirm or deny the requirement of 'Appeal/retake scheduling' as the necessary checks could not be executed. This situation is reflected in the prior steps, where multiple validations were also blocked due to similar evaluation failures.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
